name: claude-plugins-official
description: Directory of popular Claude Code extensions including development tools, productivity plugins, and MCP integrations
notes: This project-level Codex copy records the official Anthropic Claude plugin marketplace source rather than vendoring every third-party plugin repository into this repo.
The official marketplace README says internal plugins live under /plugins and external partner/community plugins live under /external_plugins.
Claude Code installs entries with /plugin install {plugin-name}@claude-plugins-official.
Pinned entries confirmed for this installation include vercel and supabase. Use the upstream marketplace JSON for the complete current plugin list.
